name: eatstreak-functions
description: EatStreak Cloud Functions — server-authoritative check-in, streaks and vouchers

scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node lib-test/streakLogic.test.js && node lib-test/checkInToken.test.js && node lib-test/billing.test.js
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore,auth
